description: Style NoteThis summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This dress is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make head turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DescriptionDark blue printed sleeveless dress, has a V neckline with lace and ruffle detail around the neckline, green binding around the neckline, green binding and lace detail around the arm holes, horizontal gathers on the chest, gathers from below the bust, lace detail on the skirt and at the hemline and has a liningMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
